summary: Gruber announces that the Daring Fireball t-shirts have arrived and are being shipped out to buyers. He credits his wife for handling the logistics of mailing several hundred shirts. Some recipients have already received theirs, while the rest will ship in the coming days. It's a brief, personal update post typical of early blogging.
key_points: Daring Fireball merchandise (t-shirts) arrived and began shipping to buyers
Gruber's wife handled the substantial logistics of mailing several hundred orders
Some early recipients were already sharing photos of their shirts online
money_quotes: Thanks to the diligent work of The Wife, several hundred shirts are now in the hands of the Postal Service.
key_insight: A brief logistics update on Daring Fireball t-shirt fulfillment, showing the early days of indie blog merchandising as a one-family operation.
